label: Structural (conf-tuned)
_note: PROVISIONAL — keeps Elo at full weight (50/50 Futi/Elo), nudges under-connected confederations up and the over-connected one down, per the struct_variants bake-off (champion among defensible variants, RPS -6.8% on the n=23 MD1 slice). Magnitude is NOT trustworthy yet (MD1-only, monotonic-to-100/0 Futi curve = overfit signature). Retune after MD2.

label: 100% Futi (no Elo)
_note: Futi-only — hits RPS 0.1916 (13/23) on the MD1 slice. Frozen June-11 ratings. Shown for direct comparison only.

label: Structural (post-MD1 fitted)
_note: Best structural that retains an Elo signal (elo_ratio≥0.25), fitted on WC26 in-tournament results — elo_ratio=0.250, mean RPS=0.1506 (-6.9% vs 50/50 baseline). Unconstrained search collapses to 0% Elo (see 100% Futi post-MD1). Retune as more matches land.
_fit_slice: fit_slice: 56 played WC26 matches as of 2026-06-26

label: 100% Futi (post-MD1 fitted)
_note: Futi-only (w_elo=0) with confederation offsets fitted on WC26 results — mean RPS=0.1461 (-9.7% vs 50/50 baseline). Retune as more matches land.
